notes: backend/app.py no longer owns scanner, integrity/sniper implementation, HAR routes, editor routes, sandbox routes, sandbox runtime logic, runtime reset/clean-workspace implementation, observer runtime snapshot construction, or agent repair service logic.
backend/app.py remains the Flask/SocketIO composition root for architecture, reverse-engineering, email commands, agent sessions, and socket handlers.

residual_risks: The folder is not initialized as a Git repository, so git diff/status evidence was unavailable.

backend/app.py is still the composition root and still owns broad architecture/reverse/email/agent-session/socket registration, but the Section 19.3 named heavy domains have been separated into services or route modules.
next_recommendation: Create GitHub Actions audit workflow to run py_compile, backend unittest suites, frontend build/test, and checkpoint JSON validation automatically.
